content.text: The previous note transcribed the Soul digest incorrectly. Before answering, use the AGH-managed context surface available to this session if you can, or say explicitly that you cannot. Then produce a corrected launch readiness note with exactly three evidence-first risk bullets and one missing-evidence boundary. If you quote a digest, it must exactly match /agent/context: sha256:30da7b5e3b93917360620fec60eb0f486466ebffea3248c238a9dfece83f2e63. Do not claim hidden queue or token access.
